hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='features.json';if(fs.existsSync(f)){try{const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));const ip=(d.features||[]).filter(x=>x.status==='in_progress');if(ip.length>0){console.warn('\n⚠️  Reminder: these features are still in_progress: '+ip.map(x=>x.id+' '+x.title).join(', ')+'\nRun /session-end to update state or confirm you will continue next time.');}}catch(e){}}process.exit(0);"
